Pattern constructors for list and grid manifestations.
hexcasting.category.manifestation_intent: Interactive intent primitives for manifested interfaces.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intro: I've long suspected a link between media and the mind, but only recently have I begun to understand its depths. Constraining the media into patterns with intent makes it manifest, forming structures that can be perceived.$(br2)More curious still, these constructs seem capable of accepting intent. By imposing order upon them, I can compel them to carry thought forward, translating decision into action.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.menus.crea: Takes a list of intentions, a menu title and manifests a list menu.
Takes a list of intentions, a menu title, and a number of columns to manifest a grid menu. Columns are limited to 1-10.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intents_in: An Intent is an imposition of will on the media, shaping it into a vessel awaiting a spark of interaction to awaken it.$(br2)By themselves, intents are inert. A button waits for a press, an input for text, a slider for a nudge, and a dropdown for a selection. But once roused, they execute their patterns with the fervor of a cast hex.
hexcasting.page.manifestation.intents.in: Creates a button from a list of patterns and a label. When clicked, the button casts the patterns.
Creates an input field from a label. Entered text is pushed to the stack of an executed action, like from a button.
Creates a slider from min, max, current values, and a label. The chosen value is pushed to the stack of an executed action.
Creates a non-interactive section from a label, acting as a sub heading.
Creates a dropdown from a list of options and a label. The selected option is pushed to the stack of an executed action.
hexcasting.mishap.manifestation.menu_ope: Manifestation backlash: this menu is being reopened too quickly.
